contexts.context: …It’s a sort followed by a partitioning, or <mark>vice-versa</mark>
…Suppose I write “!” when I wanted “!!” or <mark>vice-versa</mark>. The possibility of making mistakes makes this unacceptable…
…use hexBinary where base64Binary is required and <mark>vice-versa</mark>. And the binary operators on binary data types…
…I can do with maps, but not quite <mark>vice-versa</mark>. Why do we need records in addition to…
…you can’t do with the new functionality, or <mark>vice-versa</mark>?
